channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Houston's Kelvin Sampson was close to his 1st national title. It slipped away painfully vs. Florida
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — All Kelvin Sampson could do was stand there, hands on hips with a blank look on his face, as the ball bounced loose and Houston’s latest chance at a national title bounced away, too.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Walter Clayton Jr.'s defensive stop gives Florida its 3rd national title with 65-63 win over Houston
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Florida’s Walter Clayton Jr. came up with the perfect going-away present for that spirit-crushing Houston defense that bullied, battered and bedeviled him all night. It was a defensive gem of his own. Right before the buzzer. For the win and the national title.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego senior women's basketball team seeks to compete overseas
item.description: Ten San Diego women over 60 are representing the US in the 17th World MaxiBasketball Championship in Switzerland.
item.dc:creator: Juliette Vara, Fox 5

item.title: Retzlaff poised for another big year at BYU
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Last season, BYU quarterback Jake Retzlaff threw for almost 3,000 yards, 20 touchdowns, while rushing for over 400 yards and six TD's as the Cougars shocked everyone with an 11-2 season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Stephen A. Smith considering 2028 presidential run
item.description: Smith, who had dismissed the idea despite polls showing him as a potential top Democratic candidate, now says he's keeping his options open.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, NewsNation

item.title: Red Sox's Jarren Duran opens up about mental health, attempted suicide in Netflix documentary
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — EDITOR’S NOTE — This story includes discussion of suicide. If you or someone you know needs help, the national suicide and crisis lifeline in the U.S. is available by calling or texting 988. There is also an online chat at 988lifeline.org.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Billie Jean King immortalized in bronze with star on Hollywood Walk of Fame
item.description: Billie Jean King became the first woman to receive a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame in the new sports entertainment category.
item.dc:creator: Beth Harris, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: MLB batting average drops again to .239, near record low in 1968's Year of the Pitcher
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Offense is down again at the start of the big league season, with hits even harder to come by. The big league batting average was .239 through the first full week of play, down from .240 through the first full week of 2024.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Roberto Clemente's son sheds light on Pirates meeting after team draws fury for removing tribute
item.description: Roberto Clemente Jr. spoke to Fox News Digital about his conversation with the Pittsburgh Pirates following the team's decision to remove a tribute to his father.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — During the final sweet moments of UConn’s 12th national title, Geno Auriemma and Paige Bueckers embraced after the star guard departed her final game with the Huskies. It was the moment they wanted all along. “They’ve all been gratifying, don’t get me wrong," Auriemma said.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UConn's Geno Auriemma gives no indication of slowing down after winning 12th NCAA title
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Geno Auriemma has accomplished more than just about anyone in college basketball. The 71-year-old UConn coach passed former Stanford women’s basketball coach Tara VanDerveer as the winningest coach in Division 1 earlier this season.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UConn coach Geno Auriemma's 3-word message to Paige Bueckers in emotional embrace after winning championship
item.description: Paige Bueckers and Geno Auriemma shared an emotional embrace as she came off the court as a UConn Husky for the final time, which ended in a national championship.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Alex Ovechkin breaks Wayne Gretzky's NHL career goals record by scoring his 895th
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Alex Ovechkin has broken Wayne Gretzky’s record for the most goals in NHL history by scoring the 895th of his career. The Washington Capitals’ captain made history Sunday against the New York Islanders by beating fellow Russian Ilya Sorokin on a power play in the second period.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Pacers run over Jazz in fourth quarter in 140-112 win
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz hung with the Indiana Pacers for three quarters, trailing by just four points going into the fourth. But Indiana outscored Utah in the final quarter, 42-18 en route to a 140-112 win. The Jazz have lost eight in a row and 18 of its last 19 games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: GJ Tigers Girls Soccer pours it on Central 10-0
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — There was no moment to take a breath at Unity Field Tuesday night. Seemingly every few seconds yielded a breakaway chance for the Grand Junction Tigers' aggressive attack. And many of those chances were cashed in by the Tigers. Ten of them.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Coby White scores 28 and Bulls secure a spot in play-in tournament with 137-118 win over Raptors
item.description: Coby White scored 28 points, Talen Horton Tucker had 27 points and the Chicago Bulls locked in a spot in the Eastern Conference play-in tournament with a 137-118 win over the Toronto Raptors on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Curry hits 12 3-pointers, scores 52 as Warriors defeat Grizzlies 134-125
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Stephen Curry had 52 points, including 12 3-pointers, as the Golden State Warriors held on for a 134-125 victory over the Memphis Grizzlies on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: CLAY BAILEY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Investigation into death of former Yankees player's son turns to carbon monoxide: reports
item.description: Investigators in Costa Rica say carbon monoxide may instead be to blame for the death of Miller Gardner, the 14-year-old son of former Yankees outfielder Brett Gardner.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5
